Welcome to Noks

Fast and free Roblox scripts. Click the button below to get started.

Noks Script

Choose an option below

loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/thegop7y-ui/Unlock-all/refs/heads/main/Noks", true))()

How to use this script

  1. Get a Roblox executor (e.g. Synapse X, KRNL, Fluxus)
  2. Open Roblox and join a game
  3. Open your executor and paste the script
  4. Click Execute
